string 2: We have to find better fighters!
The Titans are strong... We need to be thoroughly prepared!

It looks like you've traveled through time again... but
something's off this time... Aegiomon isn't with you.

No sign of Inori, either. No doubt she was swallowed up by
the space-time disturbance, and Aegiomon went in after her.

It's likely she was swallowed up by the space-time
disturbance. Aegiomon seems to have gone in after her.

While their safety is a concern... the bigger issue is that
you traveled through time without Aegiomon present.

Namely, the fact that you traveled through time without
Aegiomon present.

Now that I think back on it, you were alone during your
first time travel as well.
It just may be that... we've made a big error in judgment.

Lord Merukimon is preparing to take the field, too.
Do you think he can even fight in that state...?

Merukimon's upcoming defeat is what leads to the Titans
invading the human world.

If only Merukimon were healthy, it just might be enough
to change the outcome of the battle.

What about Venusmon, the Digimon working to remedy 
the poison? Any word on his progress?

Merukimon being alive is solid proof that you've traveled
through time.
We need to try again—to keep the Shinjuku Inferno from happening.
I'd like for you to try again—to keep the Shinjuku Inferno from happening.
This time, I WILL get to the truth.{next}
In the name of ADAMAS, I'll see it gets done.{next}
I'm worried about my missing friends, too!{next}

Seeing the same anomaly repeatedly has enabled us to
glean new information on its origin.

The Titans appear in the sky above the government building.
Then Merukimon's remaining forces engage them.

Once public safety and their weapon gets involved, we have a
three-way fight. If only we knew what that giant arm was...
If only we knew what that giant arm was...

Perhaps the gate's opening and the shockwaves of the battle 
cause some kind of effect... and then a massive disturbance.

And that's how the Shinjuku Inferno unfolds... So if we stop 
the Titan invasion of our world, we stop the worst of it.

In which case... logic dictates that preventing the Titan 
invasion of our world would also prevent disaster.

In other words, if Merukimon can defeat the Titans and
survive, the outcome may change.
The outcome may change.

No worrying about the consequences of rewriting history this
time. We may have been wrong about everything, after all.

The reason being that, in the first place, these jumps
through time are—

I see you are alone... Is something wrong? Are you here
to speak with me?

The enemy is concentrating their forces on Central Town...
Our own units have already engaged them.

I have a different favor to ask of you... We find ourselves
beset by another crisis.
The operation will fail!{next}
You can't defeat the Titans...!{next}
You're going to die out there!{next}
...Wh-What? How do you know this?
The operation... will fail? How do you know this?
...Time travel? The world... will end?
This is hardly the time for insipid jokes—
That look on your face... You are not joking, are you...?

Or, rather, what would you have me do? My comrades
are already fighting in Central Town!

If only there were some way to alleviate the poison eating
away at my body... Please give me some time to think.

I must inform my comrades who are preparing... that we are
going to delay our departure.
Thank goodness we made it in time!

Within the Gear Forest, I found this growing from the
sapling under which Sirenmon slumbers!

The fruit of Karpos Hulē! With this, we can cleanse the
poison from Merukimon's body!

As long as I have the ingredients, compounding it will not
take long. I can only hope it will be ready in time...!
What...?
My body feels so light...! The antidote may be working!

And to think I nearly had given up hope...! You have my
heartfelt gratitude, O time-traversing hero.

A ray of hope after days of quiet suffering... If we fail to
grasp this chance, this time our future is truly lost.

We go forth to reclaim our pride, our soul! Now, to our
home! Onward!

We will check the Titan incursion and turn them back. We
will not let them take a single step into the human world.

If this prevents world destruction, then all the more reason
to stake my all in holding the front. I owe you that much.

You had better not blink from now on. It could all be over
in a flash the moment you close your eyes.

The enemy shall learn what it truly means to face down
the God of Speed!
Who is that?
It is still too early...
...What?

In order to replace a gear... one must first open the cover
of the clock.
Even a child knows this truth.
And so I say it is still too early.
What are you getting at?{next}
Are you another kind of anomaly?{next}
Are you on our side... or the enemy's?{next}
Everything is going as planned... No deviations from the schedule.
Allow me to test this for myself.
Ah... I see you have gotten stronger. Joyous news, indeed.
I will be waiting for you...
...in the place where the laws of time are engraved...
What was that all about?{next}
What a creepy opponent...{next}
I think it was holding back.{next}

I admit, I'm intrigued as well... However, for the time
being, allow me to simply make this declaration.
This was my... no, our dearest wish.

We have reclaimed more than mere land! We have restored
our pride, our very soul.
Central Town belongs to us once again!

The mystical medicine wiped the poison from Merukimon's
body, and strength returned to the fleet-footed warrior.

Together, with his trusted allies, Merukimon rose up. It
was time to take back their city from the invading force.
The renewed Merukimon put his vaunted speed on full display.

Together with his comrades, Merukimon scattered the
Titan army and reclaimed their city.

Finally back where they belong, Merukimon's people worked
tirelessly to restore their broken home...

...and soon the city was back to its vibrant self, a haven for
all Digimon of Iliad.
The Akashic Vision activates, even without Aegiomon present.

What could this mean...? When all the clock's lamps are
lit, the truth shall be revealed.

Seven remain...May the higher being watch over you,
chosen ones.

You've received a message. It looks like there is a video
attached to it.
I'm sorry... It looks like this is as far as I can accompany you.

ADAMAS HQ will be swallowed up by a massive space-time
disturbance any moment now.

Once that happens, my very existence will be erased...
So all I ask is... remember me.
Remember that I existed...
If I see Dr. Yuki on the road ahead, I'll tell him...
Tell him his kid is trying to save the world.

...I'm glad you and I got to work together. Thank you
for everything you've done.
I guess that's it. The rest is up to you, Agent {player}.

If what you say about seeing the future is true... then it
is too early to celebrate.

I have word that the humans' weapon has not been deployed
yet. Most likely due to our success in stopping the Titans.

But if what you say is true... this is not a cause for
celebration yet.

If the Titans intend to invade the human world, it is only a matter 
of time before they clash with the humans themselves.

Plutomon, the leader of the Titans, resides in a location 
known as "the Dark Field."

With the bulk of the Titans' forces in Central Town, the 
Dark Field is apparently only lightly guarded.

Now may be our chance to broker peace! But we need
to find out what it is the Titans seek.
